description: Repos promoted into the ranked value tier — discovered to hold concrete, build-out-worthy latent value.

ranked.value: Reusable CI governance scaffold that codifies Dependabot policy and safe patch/minor auto-merges for GitHub Actions, reducing dependency drift and maintenance overhead across repositories.
ranked.first_task: Create a repository bootstrap template that standardizes org-wide Dependabot auto-merge policy (allowed update types, required checks, branch protection/label guards) and pilot it across another active repository.
